description_long: This is a wooden picket fence section composed of vertical planks with a natural, weathered wood grain texture. Each plank is cut to a pointed tip at the top, creating a uniform, jagged silhouette along the upper edge. The planks are closely spaced, providing a solid visual barrier, and the wood shows visible knots and grain patterns, adding to its rustic appearance. The fence is a single, straight segment with no visible horizontal rails or support posts from the front or back views. The coloration is a muted, mossy brown, suggesting age or outdoor exposure. There are no decorative elements, caps, or gates present, making it a simple, utilitarian fence suitable for urban or suburban environments.
description: A rustic wooden picket fence section with pointed tops and a weathered, mossy brown finish. The planks are closely spaced and feature visible wood grain and knots.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full row of vertical wooden planks with pointed tops and detailed wood grain.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence, with planks appearing as a narrow line.
description_view_2: Back view, visually identical to the front, displaying the same pointed planks and wood texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim edge of the fence with no additional features.
